title: Simple things
description: An assembly with various mods that aid in survival and enhance the visual experience (some of these mods can lead to bans on servers).
body:
**Hi. This mod pack can help you with construction, travel, optimization, and so on. However, some mods on servers may be considered cheats, so you should download this mod yourself and I will not be responsible for any violations of the rules on the server.** 

If you don't have fabric click on [this](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)

Here is a complete list of mods, with descriptions from me.

**[Advancement Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo)**
